hooks.command: bash -c "file='D:/MT4技术指标/'$(echo '${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:file_path}' | sed 's|.*/MT4技术指标/||'); if grep -n 'signal.*\[0\].*=' \"$file\" 2>/dev/null | grep -qv EMPTY_VALUE; then echo 'WARNING: Potential bar[0] signal assignment detected in: $file'; echo 'Line(s):'; grep -n 'signal.*\[0\].*=' \"$file\" | grep -v EMPTY_VALUE; else true; fi"
